requirements: Atomic writes with journaling and recovery
Safe concurrent edit protocol with lock files
Immutable audit logs for all roadmap changes

phases.name: Canonical Governance
phases.description: Establish the canonical path for ROADMAP_CURRENT.json, resolve ambiguity, and enforce source_of_truth = repository_files_only.
deliverables: ROADMAP_CURRENT.json as single source of truth

phases.name: Durability
phases.description: Focus on atomic writes, journaling, recovery, checkpointing, and testing resilience against power loss and network disconnection.

phases.name: Automation
phases.description: Includes auto-sync scheduler, auto-commit/push, retry queues, and startup resume/reconciliation.

phases.name: Backups
phases.description: Covers local, remote, and hardware backups, emphasizing verification and restore evidence.

phases.name: Concurrency
phases.description: Addresses single-writer protocols, lock files with TTL, pre/post hash validation, and merge/conflict policies for safe concurrent editing.

phases.name: Real-Money Readiness
phases.description: Requires immutable audit logs, signed releases, and operational runbooks for production/commercial readiness.

current_focus: Establishing canonical governance and atomic write operations
